Card Text: Deal 6 damage.
Upgraded Text: Deal 9 damage.
Notes: Starting card. Remove when possible.

Card Text: Gain 5 Block.
Upgraded Text: Gain 8 Block.
Notes: Starting card. Remove when possible.

Card Text: Osty deals damage equal to his HP.
Upgraded Text: Osty deals damage equal to his HP +2.
Notes: Starter. Damage scales with Osty's HP. Core damage source. Keep Osty alive = more damage.

Card Text: Summon 5.
Upgraded Text: Summon 8.
Notes: Starter. Adds HP to Osty (or revives him). Barricade-style block that carries over turns.

Card Text: Draw 2 cards. Gain 3 energy. At the start of your turn, apply 3 Doom to yourself.
Upgraded Text: Draw 2 cards. Gain 3 energy. At the start of your turn, apply 3 Doom to yourself.
Notes: Offering/Adrenaline tier. 3 energy + 2 cards for 0. Self-doom rarely matters. Top rare.

Card Text: Enemy loses 3 HP. Add 3 Souls into your draw pile.
Upgraded Text: Enemy loses 4 HP. Add 4 Souls into your draw pile.
Notes: Two-card infinite with Borrowed Time. Souls = 0-cost draw 2. Disgusting. Nerfed but still strong.

Card Text: Deal 33 damage to ALL enemies. Costs 2 less for each Ethereal card played this combat.
Upgraded Text: Deal 39 damage to ALL enemies. Costs 2 less for each Ethereal card played this combat.
Notes: Often costs 0. Many good cards have Ethereal. 33 AoE damage wins most fights. Top damage card.

Card Text: Ethereal. At the start of your turn, gain 1 energy and draw 1 card.
Upgraded Text: Costs 2. Ethereal. At the start of your turn, gain 1 energy and draw 1 card.
Notes: Draw + energy every turn. Upgrade makes it easier to play. Both resources = S tier.

Card Text: Summon 3 X times. Add X Souls into your draw pile. Exhaust.
Upgraded Text: Summon 4 X times. Add X+ Souls into your draw pile. Exhaust.
Notes: Main infinite enabler. Scales Osty HP (damage) + adds draw. Exhausts now but still broken.

Card Text: Ethereal. Transform a card in your draw pile into a Soul.
Upgraded Text: Costs 0. Ethereal. Transform a card in your draw pile into a Soul.
Notes: Zero-cost deck thinning. Transform bad cards into draw 2. Enables infinite quickly. Gross.

Card Text: At the end of combat, you may remove a card from your deck. Eternal.
Upgraded Text: At the end of combat, you may remove a card from your deck. Eternal.
Notes: Ancient exclusive. Card removal = infinite enabler. Completely broken if offered.

Card Text: Lose 2 Strength. Gain 1 energy at the start of each turn.
Upgraded Text: Lose 1 Strength. Gain 1 energy at the start of each turn.
Notes: Strength loss doesn't matter - Osty deals your damage. Free energy every turn. Pick every copy.

Card Text: Osty deals 10 damage. Deals additional damage equal to Osty's max HP.
Upgraded Text: Costs 0. Osty deals 15 damage. Deals additional damage equal to Osty's max HP.
Notes: Ancient exclusive. Massive damage if building Osty. Upgrade to 0 is disgusting.

Card Text: Deal 13 damage. Permanently increase this card's damage by 3. Exhaust.
Upgraded Text: Deal 17 damage. Permanently increase this card's damage by 3. Exhaust.
Notes: Genetic Algorithm but damage. Get early = snowball. Hallway farming card. S if Act 1.

Card Text: Ethereal. Gain 6 Block. Apply 1 Weak.
Upgraded Text: Ethereal. Gain 9 Block. Apply 1 Weak.
Notes: Best block common. Ethereal + Weak + Block. Basically block 20 for 1. Upgrade is solid.

Card Text: Apply 3 Doom to yourself. Gain 1 energy.
Upgraded Text: Apply 3 Doom to yourself. Gain 2 energy.
Notes: Was S-tier, nerfed. Self-doom increased. Still infinite enabler with Capture Spirit. Pickable.

Card Text: Gain 6 Block. If you applied Doom this turn, Block two additional times.
Upgraded Text: Gain 8 Block. If you applied Doom this turn, Block two additional times.
Notes: 18 block for 1 if you have Doom. Works with Countdown. Disgusting block card.

Card Text: Deal 10 damage. Vulnerable and Weak are twice as effective for 3 turns.
Upgraded Text: Deal 12 damage. Vulnerable and Weak are twice as effective for 4 turns.
Notes: Weak blocks 50% instead of 25%. Vuln = 100% more damage. 3 turns is insane. Gross.

Card Text: Ethereal. Enemy loses 8 Strength this turn.
Upgraded Text: Ethereal. Enemy loses 10 Strength this turn.
Notes: Piercing Wail equivalent. Full blocks multi-attackers. Ethereal = synergies + exhausts. A tier.

Card Text: Apply 21 Doom and 1 Weak to ALL enemies.
Upgraded Text: Apply 27 Doom and 2 Weak to ALL enemies.
Notes: 21 AoE Doom + Weak. Big numbers. Great early game. Ends multi-enemy fights.

Card Text: Apply 29 Doom to ALL enemies. Kill enemies with at least as much Doom as HP.
Upgraded Text: Apply 35 Doom to ALL enemies. Kill enemies with at least as much Doom as HP.
Notes: Instant Doom execution. Kills Decimillipede segments. Early game AoE clear. A tier.

Card Text: Osty deals 3 damage. If this is the first time this card has been played this turn, draw 1 card.
Upgraded Text: Osty deals 4 damage. If this is the first time this card has been played this turn, draw 1 card.
Notes: FTL but always works. Free damage + draw. Enables Osty attack package. Always pickable.

Card Text: Osty deals 10 damage. Double the damage all Hang cards deal to the enemy.
Upgraded Text: Osty deals 14 damage. Double the damage all Hang cards deal to the enemy.
Notes: Claw but good. Boss killer. One card solves damage problem. Multiple copies stack.

Card Text: Whenever you play a Soul, a random enemy loses 6 HP.
Upgraded Text: Whenever you play a Soul, a random enemy loses 8 HP.
Notes: Infinite payoff. Even without infinite, 3 Souls = 18 damage for free. Rewards Soul strategy.

Card Text: Ethereal. The first attack each turn deals 50% additional damage.
Upgraded Text: Ethereal. The first attack each turn deals 75% additional damage.
Notes: 50% more damage on Unleash. Stacks additively. Works with Eradicate. Great scaling.

Card Text: Deal 7 damage. Apply any debuffs on the enemy to all other characters.
Upgraded Text: Deal 10 damage. Apply any debuffs on the enemy to all other characters.
Notes: Free damage. Transfer Weak/Doom to all enemies. Gross in multi-enemy fights.

Card Text: Whenever you play an Ethereal card, gain 4 Block.
Upgraded Text: Whenever you play an Ethereal card, gain 5 Block.
Notes: Mental Fortress but Ethereal. Many cards have Ethereal. Blocks millions per turn. A tier.

Card Text: Retain. Deal 11 damage X times.
Upgraded Text: Retain. Deal 14 damage X times.
Notes: Skewer with Retain. Combos with Lethality and Debilitate. Hold for big burst turn.

Card Text: Apply 10 Doom plus an additional 5 Doom for every 10 Doom already on the enemy.
Upgraded Text: Apply 13 Doom plus an additional 6 Doom for every 13 Doom already on the enemy.
Notes: Boss killer for Doom decks. Stacks exponentially. One card solves boss scaling.

Card Text: Add 4 Souls into your draw pile.
Upgraded Text: Add 5 Souls into your draw pile.
Notes: Multiplayer only? But crazy Soul generation. Draw 8-10 cards worth.

Card Text: Osty deals 25 damage. Deals 5 additional damage for each other Osty attack this turn.
Upgraded Text: Osty deals 30 damage. Deals 6 additional damage for each other Osty attack this turn.
Notes: Osty package payoff. Need Fetch/Flatten/Poke setup but huge damage.

Card Text: Gain 8 Block. Add a Soul into your draw pile.
Upgraded Text: Gain 11 Block. Add a Soul into your draw pile.
Notes: Shrug it Off + draw 2 later. Premium block common. Take multiple copies.

Card Text: If Osty is alive, he deals 9 damage to ALL enemies and you gain 9 Block. Osty dies.
Upgraded Text: If Osty is alive, he deals 12 damage to ALL enemies and you gain 12 Block. Osty dies.
Notes: AoE + block but kills Osty. Good early when Osty is low anyway. Awkward late.

Card Text: At the start of your turn, apply 6 Doom to a random enemy.
Upgraded Text: At the start of your turn, apply 7 Doom to a random enemy.
Notes: Noxious Fumes but Doom. Opens Doom synergies. Enables Death's Door every turn.

Card Text: Osty deals 12 damage. This card costs 0 if Osty has attacked this turn.
Upgraded Text: Osty deals 15 damage. This card costs 0 if Osty has attacked this turn.
Notes: Free 12 damage with Fetch. Loopable. Multiple copies get scary. Needs Osty attacks.

Card Text: Summon 20. Exhaust.
Upgraded Text: Summon 24. Exhaust.
Notes: Impervious but carries over. Big block that stays. 3 energy is clunky.

Card Text: Deal 8 damage. Deal 3 additional damage for each card drawn during your turn.
Upgraded Text: Deal 11 damage. Deal 4 additional damage for each card drawn during your turn.
Notes: Scales with Souls. 8 base is fine. With Soul chains = 20+ damage for 1.

Card Text: Gain 5 Block. Apply 7 Doom to ALL enemies.
Upgraded Text: Gain 7 Block. Apply 11 Doom to ALL enemies.
Notes: Block common that also does AoE damage. 7 block + 11 AoE Doom. Why is this common?

Card Text: Put 3 cards from your discard pile into your hand. Exhaust.
Upgraded Text: Put 4 cards from your discard pile into your hand. Exhaust.
Notes: Retrieve combo pieces. Pull back Borrowed Time, Souls, big blocks. Exhausts itself.

Card Text: Osty deals 11 damage to ALL enemies. Apply 2 Vulnerable to ALL enemies.
Upgraded Text: Osty deals 14 damage to ALL enemies. Apply 2 Vulnerable to ALL enemies.
Notes: AoE + Vuln. Works with Lethality/Debilitate. Solid setup card.

Card Text: Gain 13 Block. This card's cost is reduced by 1 whenever anyone dies.
Upgraded Text: Gain 16 Block. This card's cost is reduced by 1 whenever anyone dies.
Notes: Osty dying counts! Can become 0-cost 13 block. Cool design. Bone Shards synergy.

Card Text: Exhaust your hand. If 9 cards were exhausted this way, gain 1 Intangible.
Upgraded Text: Exhaust your hand. If 9 cards were exhausted this way, gain 1 Intangible.
Notes: 9 cards is rare without Souls. But exhaust hand = faster infinite. B tier for that.

Card Text: Whenever attacks deal damage, they also apply that much Doom.
Upgraded Text: Whenever attacks deal damage, they also apply that much Doom.
Notes: Double your damage effectively. 3 energy is clunky but gross payoff in bosses.

Card Text: Osty deals 7 damage. Add Retain to a card in your hand.
Upgraded Text: Osty deals 9 damage. Add Retain to a card in your hand.
Notes: Permanent Retain is strong. Line up combos. Better than it looks.

Card Text: Osty deals 9 damage. Deals 2 additional damage for each Soul in your exhaust pile.
Upgraded Text: Osty deals 12 damage. Deals 3 additional damage for each Soul in your exhaust pile.
Notes: Boss killer for Soul decks. 9 base is fine. Scales with Soul generation.

Card Text: Retain. Deal 8 damage to ALL enemies.
Upgraded Text: Retain. Deal 11 damage to ALL enemies.
Notes: Cleave with Retain. AoE is important. Solid Act 1 pick.

Card Text: Gain 7 Block. Add a copy of this card into your discard pile.
Upgraded Text: Gain 10 Block. Add a copy of this card into your discard pile.
Notes: Opposite of Anger for block. Need exhaust to control growth. Decent frontload.

Card Text: Whenever you apply Doom, gain 2 Block.
Upgraded Text: Whenever you apply Doom, gain 3 Block.
Notes: Doom = block. Works with Countdown. Package dependent but solid.

Card Text: Lose 2 Strength. Enemy loses 2 Strength. Exhaust.
Upgraded Text: Lose 1 Strength. Enemy loses 1 Strength. Exhaust.
Notes: Free Disarm. Strength loss irrelevant if Osty attacks. Great vs multi-attackers.

Card Text: Add Replay to a card in your hand. It costs 1 extra energy. Exhaust.
Upgraded Text: Add Replay to a card in your hand. It costs 1 extra energy. Exhaust.
Notes: Replay = play twice. On Dirge = insane. Draw order dependent but high ceiling.

Card Text: Deal 10 damage. Next Ethereal card you play costs 0.
Upgraded Text: Deal 13 damage. Next Ethereal card you play costs 0.
Notes: 10 damage + energy cheat. Cheats Domain into play. Solid.

Card Text: Whenever you play a Soul, Summon 1.
Upgraded Text: Whenever you play a Soul, Summon 2.
Notes: Souls = Osty HP = damage + defense. Needs Soul synergy. High ceiling.

Card Text: Osty attacks deal 4 additional damage.
Upgraded Text: Osty attacks deal 6 additional damage.
Notes: Accuracy for Osty. Weaker (fewer attacks than Shivs) but still solid.

Card Text: Ethereal. Draw 3 cards.
Upgraded Text: Ethereal. Draw 4 cards.
Notes: Skim with Ethereal. Necro has lots of draw already but still good.

Card Text: Deal damage equal to enemy's Doom. Exhaust.
Upgraded Text: Deal damage equal to enemy's Doom. Exhaust.
Notes: Doom payoff. Need Doom stacking but can do big burst.

Card Text: Deal 9 damage. Add a Soul into your draw pile.
Upgraded Text: Deal 12 damage. Add a Soul into your draw pile.
Notes: Pommel Strike but delayed draw. Fine damage common.

Card Text: Deal 10 damage. Upgrade 2 random cards in your discard pile.
Upgraded Text: Deal 10 damage. Upgrade 3 random cards in your discard pile.
Notes: Slow value. Janky scaling. Not exciting but does something.

Card Text: Ethereal. Deal 7 damage. Apply 1 Vulnerable.
Upgraded Text: Ethereal. Deal 9 damage. Apply 2 Vulnerable.
Notes: One energy Bash. Ethereal is good. Sets up damage.

Card Text: Deal 9 damage. Add Ethereal to a card in your hand.
Upgraded Text: Deal 12 damage. Add Ethereal to a card in your hand.
Notes: Enables Ethereal synergies. Deck thinning tool. Fine.

Card Text: Deal 4 damage. Put a card from your discard pile into your hand. Exhaust.
Upgraded Text: Deal 6 damage. Put a card from your discard pile into your hand. Exhaust.
Notes: Hologram but damage. Rather have block version but does something.

Card Text: Deal 8 damage. Apply Doom equal to damage dealt.
Upgraded Text: Deal 10 damage. Apply Doom equal to damage dealt.
Notes: Doom + damage. Essentially 16 damage for 1 if Doom executes. Okay.

Card Text: Apply 13 Doom. Draw 1 card.
Upgraded Text: Apply 16 Doom. Draw 2 cards.
Notes: Doom + draw. Decent numbers. Damage common that cycles.

Card Text: Osty deals 6 damage.
Upgraded Text: Osty deals 8 damage.
Notes: Zero-cost Osty attack. Bridges into Osty package. Decent early.

Card Text: Summon 4. Gain 7 Block.
Upgraded Text: Summon 6. Gain 10 Block.
Notes: Block 11 essentially. Some carries over. 2 energy is awkward.

Card Text: Summon 6. Exhaust.
Upgraded Text: Summon 9. Exhaust.
Notes: Slightly better Bodyguard that exhausts. Not exciting.

Card Text: Osty deals 4 damage. Whenever you play a card that costs 2+, return this from discard.
Upgraded Text: Osty deals 6 damage. Whenever you play a card that costs 2+, return this from discard.
Notes: Free damage loop. Awkward to enable. Needs expensive cards.

Card Text: Deal 5 damage for each Ethereal card played this combat.
Upgraded Text: Deal 7 damage for each Ethereal card played this combat.
Notes: Ethereal payoff. Need 4+ Ethereal cards. Boss killer for Ethereal builds.

Card Text: Retain. Summon 3. Osty heals 5 HP.
Upgraded Text: Retain. Summon 5. Osty heals 7 HP.
Notes: Block + heal for Osty. Retain is nice. Needs Osty stacking.

Card Text: Next turn, Summon 2 and gain 2 energy.
Upgraded Text: Next turn, Summon 3 and gain 3 energy.
Notes: Outmaneuver + Summon. Setup card. Fights go long so usually fine.

Card Text: Gain 11 Block. Next turn, gain 1 energy.
Upgraded Text: Gain 14 Block. Next turn, gain 2 energy.
Notes: Converting energy now to later. Okay but Defy exists.

Card Text: Retain. Deal 27 damage.
Upgraded Text: Retain. Deal 33 damage.
Notes: Big damage with Retain. Doesn't scale. Good early, falls off.

Card Text: Summon 3. Exhaust a card from your draw pile.
Upgraded Text: Summon 5. Exhaust a card from your draw pile.
Notes: Target exhaust + block. Enables infinite. Not exciting but useful.

Card Text: At the start of your turn, add 1 random card into your hand with Ethereal.
Upgraded Text: At the start of your turn, add 1 random card into your hand with Ethereal.
Notes: Hello World that doesn't clog. Free cards. Enables Ethereal synergies.

Card Text: Apply 2 Weak. Apply 2 Vulnerable. Exhaust.
Upgraded Text: Apply 3 Weak. Apply 3 Vulnerable. Exhaust.
Notes: Debuff card. Needs Lethality/Debilitate to really shine.

Card Text: At the start of your turn, add 1 Sweeping Gaze into your hand.
Upgraded Text: At the start of your turn, add 1 Sweeping Gaze into your hand.
Notes: 10 Osty damage per turn. 2 energy is rough. Countdown is better.

Card Text: Retain. If Osty is alive, he dies. Gain Block equal to double his max HP.
Upgraded Text: Costs 0. Retain. If Osty is alive, he dies. Gain Block equal to double his max HP.
Notes: Huge block if Osty is big. Awkward early. Upgrade to 0 is nice.

Card Text: Summon 5. Whenever Osty loses HP, all enemies lose that much HP.
Upgraded Text: Summon 8. Whenever Osty loses HP, all enemies lose that much HP.
Notes: AoE when Osty takes damage. Doesn't work with Bone Shards (he dies). Weird.

Card Text: Osty deals 7 damage. Hits an additional time for each other Osty attack this turn.
Upgraded Text: Osty deals 9 damage. Hits an additional time for each other Osty attack this turn.
Notes: Needs Osty attacks to work. High ceiling with Fetch/Poke. Package dependent.

Card Text: Summon 7 for each Osty attack played this turn.
Upgraded Text: Summon 9 for each Osty attack played this turn.
Notes: Osty package payoff. Need setup. Free block if built for it.

Card Text: Deal 13 damage. Add a Soul into your hand, draw pile, and discard pile.
Upgraded Text: Deal 16 damage. Add a Soul into your hand, draw pile, and discard pile.
Notes: 3 Souls but 2 energy. Lets you Soul chain same turn (hand). Fine.

Card Text: Gain 1 energy. Exhaust.
Upgraded Text: Gain 1 energy. Retain. Exhaust.
Notes: Worse Miracle. Doesn't upgrade to 2 energy. Brick in bad hands.

Card Text: Whenever you play a card that costs 0, apply 3 Doom to the enemy.
Upgraded Text: Whenever you play a card that costs 0, apply 4 Doom to the enemy.
Notes: Needs 0-cost spam. Souls don't trigger (exhaust not 0-cost). Weak payoff.

Card Text: Deal 52 damage.
Upgraded Text: Deal 60 damage.
Notes: 4 energy is brutal. Often unplayable. Need energy gen. Feels like a curse.

Card Text: Whenever you play a card that costs 2+, gain 4 Block.
Upgraded Text: Whenever you play a card that costs 2+, gain 6 Block.
Notes: Proc once a turn max. Metallicize gives 3 free. Why does this exist?

Card Text: Deal 13 damage.
Notes: NEW - needs evaluation

Card Text: ALL players [gold]Summon[/gold] 6.
Notes: NEW - summon/bone synergy

Card Text: Whenever you draw an [gold]Ethereal[/gold] card, draw 1 card.
Notes: NEW - Ethereal synergy

Card Text: Whenever you apply a debuff to an enemy, they take 9 damage.
Notes: NEW - needs evaluation
